(total {len(text)} chars)\")\n        \n        # 提取电话号码\n        patterns = [\n            r'1[3-9]\\d{9}',  # 中国手机号\n            r'\\d{3,4}-\\d{7,8}',  # 座机\n            r'\\d{4}\\s?\\d{4}',  # 8位号码\n            r'\\d{8,11}',  # 连续8-11位数字\n        ]\n        \n        found = set()\n        for p in patterns:\n            matches = re.findall(p, text)\n            for m in matches:\n                # 过滤可能的误报（太短或太长的）\n                if len(m.replace('-', '').replace(' ', '')) >= 8:\n                    found.add(m)\n        \n        print(f\"\\n[Possible Phone Numbers]\\n{list(found) if found else 'None'}\")\n        \n        # 搜索预订/电话关键词\n        keywords = ['预订', '预约', '订位', '电话', 'Tel', 'Phone', '订餐', '订座', '热线', '联系电话']\n        print(f\"\\n[Keyword Matches]\")\n        lines = text.split('\\n')\n        for i, line in enumerate(lines):\n            line_clean = line.strip()\n            for kw in keywords:\n                if kw.lower() in line_clean.lower():\n                    print(f\"  L{i}: {line_clean}\")\n                    break\n                    \n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"Error: {e}\")"}}🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `code_run`  📥**参数:**

image_path = "fixtures/media/image.jpg"

# 检查文件实际类型
result = subprocess.run(["file", image_path], capture_output=True, text=True)
print(f"文件类型: {result.stdout}")

# 尝试打开并转换
try:
    img = Image.open(image_path)
    print(f"图片格式: {img.format}")
    print(f"图片模式: {img.mode}")
    print(f"图片尺寸: {img.size}")
    
    # 转换为RGB模式（兼容OCR）
    if img.mode != 'RGB':
        img = img.convert('RGB')
    
    # 保存为临时PNG
    temp_path = "/tmp/ocr_temp.png"
    img.save(temp_path, 'PNG')
    
    # OCR提取
    import pytesseract
    text = pytesseract.image_to_string(temp_path)
    print(f"\n=== 提取的文本 ===\n{text}")
    
    # 清理临时文件
    os.remove(temp_path)
    
except Exception as e:
    print(f"错误: {e}")
    import traceback
    traceback.print_exc()
